about.intro: I'm a Software Engineer graduated from Universidad de La Frontera (Temuco, Chile). I like understanding problems before writing code, designing architectures that scale, and keeping them readable over time. I enjoy fullstack work both crafting backend logic and making the frontend feel smooth and I'm especially interested in software security and static analysis, an area I explored in depth during my thesis.
